_comment: Edit this file to change which browser versions get downloaded. Run download-browsers.ps1 (Windows) or download-browsers.sh (Mac) after editing.

_format.chrome: Official Chrome for Testing version from Google, e.g. 148.0.7778.97 - verify at https://googlechromelabs.github.io/chrome-for-testing/
_format.edge: Derived from chrome versions through _chromium_alignment.edge because Edge shares Chromium by major version, not exact full Chromium version.
_format.opera: Derived from chrome versions through _chromium_alignment.opera because Opera shares Chromium by major version, not exact full Chromium version.
_format.brave: Brave app version (without leading v), e.g. 1.66.115 - verify at https://github.com/brave/brave-browser/releases

_chromium_alignment.note: Chrome uses official Chrome for Testing versions. Edge and Opera use vendor browser versions aligned to the same Chromium major milestones.

_system_only.note: These browsers have no public version archive; run them via browser-paths.properties as system installs.
_system_only.comet: Perplexity Comet — Chromium-based, auto-updates, no downloadable archive
_system_only.duckduckgo: DuckDuckGo Browser — Chromium-based, auto-updates, no downloadable archive
_system_only.safari: macOS only, WebKit engine — use 'webkit' as browser name in index.js for a WebKit-rendered run
_system_only.atlas: ChatGPT Atlas by OpenAI — macOS-only Chromium-based browser, configure path in browser-paths.properties
